workflow_runs.display_title: Add GitHub Actions workflow for GKE deployment

head_commit.message:
Add GitHub Actions workflow for GKE deployment

This workflow builds a Docker container, publishes it to Google Container Registry, and deploys it to GKE upon pushes to the main branch. It includes steps for authentication, building the image, and deploying to the Kubernetes cluster.
